fields.title: Simplify agent settings: remove complexity, add model shorthand
fields.description:
Simplify the agent settings override surface in settings.json.

## Changes

### 1. Remove complexity routing from agent settings
Remove the `complexity` key from agent settings entirely. This includes:
- Remove `complexity` from `ALLOWED_AGENT_SETTINGS_KEYS`
- Remove `ALLOWED_COMPLEXITY_CONFIG_KEYS`
- Remove `COMPLEXITY_LEVELS` (if only used here)
- Remove `ComplexityConfig` interface
- Remove `complexity` from `AgentSettingsOverride` interface
- Remove all complexity parsing/validation in `loadAgentSettingsFromJson`
- Remove complexity resolution in `AgentRegistry.resolve()` — the `complexity` parameter can stay in the signature (it comes from the spawn tool) but should be ignored for settings lookup
- Remove/update tests that test complexity overrides

### 2. Add singular `model` shorthand in agent settings
Accept both forms in settings.json:

Simple (90% case):
```json
{
  "agents": {
    "review": {
      "model": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4"
    }
  }
}
```

Full (existing, still works):
```json
{
  "agents": {
    "review": {
      "models": [{ "model": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4", "thinking": "high" }]
    }
  }
}
```

Rules:
- `model` (string) is shorthand for `models: [{ model: <value> }]` with thinking inherited
- If both `model` and `models` are present, fail with a clear error (ambiguous)
- Add `model` to `ALLOWED_AGENT_SETTINGS_KEYS`
- Validate model string format via existing `validatePromptModeModelId`

### 3. Keep inherit as default
No changes to agent .md files. `model: inherit` stays as default.

## Files to change
- `src/agent/agent-registry.ts` — main changes
- `test/agent-registry-strict-config.test.ts` — update tests

## Quality gate
`npm run gate` from extensions/tau/
